originalTitle: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
title: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
content: Biniam Solomon was known for his witty and critical cartoons before the free press was closed.

originalTitle: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 100
title: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 100
content: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

originalTitle: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
title: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
content: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.

originalTitle: ICC prosecutor opens probe into Belarus over deportations to Lithuania
title: ICC prosecutor opens probe into Belarus over deportations to Lithuania
content: The prosecutor's office said the crimes being investigated include deportation and persecution through deportation.

originalTitle: Somalia warns against any Israeli base plans on Somaliland
title: Somalia warns against any Israeli base plans on Somaliland
content: Somali minister tells Al Jazeera Israeli base plans in Somaliland risk dragging Somalia into 'external confrontations'.

originalTitle: How oil is at the center of the US-Israel war with Iran
title: How oil is at the center of the US-Israel war with Iran
content: As oil prices rise, the US, Israel and Iran seem ready to keep fighting no matter the costs.

title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
content: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

originalTitle: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
content: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

originalTitle: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
title: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
content: Fake dealerships were manipulating the state vehicle licensing agency's official records, France's auditor has found.

originalTitle: 'Not appropriate' for Iran to be at World Cup - Trump
title: 'Not appropriate' for Iran to be at World Cup - Trump
content: US president Donald Trump says Iran are "welcome" at the 2026 World Cup but it is not "appropriate" for them to be there.

originalTitle: From best in league to bench - Foden's mysterious loss of form
title: From best in league to bench - Foden's mysterious loss of form
content: Analysing the reasons that playmaker Phil Foden has started only four of Manchester City's past 12 games.

originalTitle: Rangers 'unequivocally condemn' Old Firm fan disorder
title: Rangers 'unequivocally condemn' Old Firm fan disorder
content: Rangers say they "unequivocally" condemn Sunday's "unacceptable" Old Firm fan disorder and they support the Scottish FA launching an independent review of the Scottish Cup quarter-final with Celtic at Ibrox.
